title: selago vulgaris
intro: Selago vulgaris, also known as blue curls or Cape gentian, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selago vulgaris include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Selago vulgaris can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
